text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A while ago, a kid I know asked me to<n>fix up their
ripped stuffed animal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I did, and when I handed it back to<n>them, they
gave me this big smile and<n>called me the "Plushie
Doctor."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you can tell, but stuffed animals<n>aren't
exactly my thing. But I don't<n>know, after seeing
that smile...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I guess being a "Plushie Doctor"<n>wouldn't
be so bad.
